title: Directive independent verification (v2, multi-task)
description: Per-TASK independent verification records for the Owner Directive Compliance System (D-001 amendment 3, Section 2). One directive may govern several tasks, each with its own allowed paths, content-manifest identity, evidence, and independent verifier. Each task_verifications[] entry is a self-contained clean-context review of exactly the requirements APPLICABLE TO THAT TASK. accept() reads the entry matching (directive_id, task_id) as BLOCKING EVIDENCE: an in-regime task is refused unless every requirement applicable to IT is PASS at the reviewed content identity, by an independent verifier (verifier != producer, per task). Acceptance AUTHORITY and all state transitions remain in tools/project_control.py -- this is evidence the CLI consumes, not a second gate. Missing, duplicate, extra, stale, or cross-task rows FAIL CLOSED. 'ALL' means all requirements applicable to the current task, not every requirement belonging to the directive.

migrated_from.description: prior schema id this record was migrated from, e.g. 'directive_verification/v1' (evidence history preserved)
